candidate_definitions.text: BladeDISC is an end-to-end DynamIc Shape Compiler project for machine learning workloads.
We're always looking for candicates to join dev team. Your're the one we're searching for long:
Optimizing Monocular Depth Estimation with TensorRT: Model Conversion, Inference Acceleration, and 3D Reconstruction

This project aims to optimize the inference performance of various monocular depth estimation models using NVIDIA's TensorRT. It provides a pipeline to convert pre-trained PyTorch models into ONNX format and then into TensorRT engines, allowing for a comparative analysis of infe…
